title: The Real Mechanics Behind Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a talented graphic designer in Nairobi, Kenya, with a side hustle selling exclusive design assets to clients worldwide. You've built a reputation for delivering high-quality work, but every time you try to sell digital products like fonts, templates, or presets, you hit a roadblock: your clients can't pay you using PayPal or Stripe due to geographic restrictions. This leaves you feeling stuck and frustrated, wondering how to get paid for your hard work. It's a situation that many digital creators in restricted countries face, but with the right tools, you can break free from these limitations and start selling your design assets with ease.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

When you sell digital products, you're creating intangible assets that can be easily replicated and distributed worldwide. However, traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe often restrict access to creators in certain countries, making it difficult for them to get paid. This is where crypto payments come in – a decentralized alternative that allows for borderless transactions and instant settlements. By using a crypto payment gateway, you can bypass these restrictions and start selling your design assets to clients globally, without worrying about geographical limitations.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

At its core, a crypto payment gateway uses blockchain technology to facilitate transactions between buyers and sellers. When a client makes a purchase, the payment is processed using a cryptocurrency like Bitcoin or Ethereum, which is then converted to the seller's preferred fiat currency at the time of transaction. This process is usually automated, ensuring that the seller receives their payment instantly, without the need for intermediaries. The Core Shop Engine is a powerful tool that simplifies this process, providing a seamless experience for both buyers and sellers.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is designed specifically for digital creators like you, who face challenges selling their products due to geographical restrictions or banking limitations. Whether you're selling fonts, templates, presets, or other design assets, this tool provides a straightforward solution for getting paid without the hassle of traditional payment processors. By catering to the needs of creators in restricted countries, the Core Shop Engine aims to democratize access to global markets and help you achieve your financial goals.
Crypto payments offer a unique opportunity for digital creators to reach a global audience.
The Components That Make It Work Together

A successful crypto payment gateway typically consists of three key components: a payment processor, a wallet integration, and a decentralized cryptocurrency exchange. The payment processor handles the transaction, while the wallet integration allows buyers to make payments using their preferred cryptocurrency. The decentralized exchange facilitates the conversion of cryptocurrencies to fiat currencies, ensuring a seamless experience for both parties. The Core Shop Engine integrates these components seamlessly, providing a reliable and efficient payment solution for digital creators.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the mechanics behind selling design assets with crypto payments, it's time to take action. Here's a step-by-step guide to help you get started: Research the Core Shop Engine and its features, including automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Set up a NOWPayments account, which is integrated with the Core Shop Engine for seamless transactions. Create a sales page for your design assets and configure the payment settings using the Core Shop Engine. Finally, promote your products to your target audience and start selling!
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The most common question people ask when it comes to crypto payments is: 'Is it safe?' The answer is yes, crypto payments are secure and reliable, especially when using a reputable payment processor like NOWPayments. By understanding the technology behind crypto payments, you can make informed decisions and start selling your design assets with confidence.
The Core Shop Engine simplifies the process of getting paid with crypto, making it accessible to creators of all levels.
